item.title: Jealousy Turned A Secret Affair Into A Deadly Obsession
item.description: Heather Garraus was a Colorado wife and mother whose life was cut short after becoming the target of a deadly love triangle. Investigators revealed that a long running affair, betrayal, and escalating jealousy culminated in a carefully planned attack that shocked the community and led to a life sentence.

media:content.media:title: Jealousy Turned A Secret Affair Into A Deadly Obsession
media:content.media:description: Heather Garraus was a Colorado wife and mother whose life was cut short after becoming the target of a deadly love triangle. Investigators revealed that a long running affair, betrayal, and escalating jealousy culminated in a carefully planned attack that shocked the community and led to a life sentence.

item.title: He Almost Got Away With The Perfect Murder
item.description: Mark Winger convinced police he was a grieving husband who had stopped a violent intruder from attacking his wife. For years, investigators believed his story, but a closer look at the evidence revealed an elaborate scheme involving deception, a staged crime scene, and the murder of both his wife and an innocent man he tried to frame.

media:content.media:title: He Almost Got Away With The Perfect Murder
media:content.media:description: Mark Winger convinced police he was a grieving husband who had stopped a violent intruder from attacking his wife. For years, investigators believed his story, but a closer look at the evidence revealed an elaborate scheme involving deception, a staged crime scene, and the murder of both his wife and an innocent man he tried to frame.

item.title: He Walked Away During A Storm And Was Never Seen Again
item.description: Chance Englebert vanished in Nebraska after leaving a family gathering following an argument in July 2019. Surveillance cameras captured him walking through town as a severe storm moved in, but he disappeared without a trace. In 2025, his remains were found near Scotts Bluff National Monument, and investigators concluded he died from an accidental fall, though many questions about his final hours remain.

media:content.media:title: He Walked Away During A Storm And Was Never Seen Again
media:content.media:description: Chance Englebert vanished in Nebraska after leaving a family gathering following an argument in July 2019. Surveillance cameras captured him walking through town as a severe storm moved in, but he disappeared without a trace. In 2025, his remains were found near Scotts Bluff National Monument, and investigators concluded he died from an accidental fall, though many questions about his final hours remain.
